name: Marco Polo Marine Ltd.
summary: Marco Polo Marine Ltd., an investment holding company, operates as an integrated marine logistic company primarily in Singapore, Indonesia, Australia, Myanmar, Taiwan, and Malaysia. It operates through Ship Chartering Services; and Ship Building and Repair Services segments. The company engages in chartering of offshore supply vessels, such as anchor handling tug supply vessels, as well as tugboats and barges for mining, commodities, construction, infrastructure, and land reclamation industries. It is also involved in ship building business, as well as provision of ship maintenance, repair, outfitting, and conversion services. In addition, the company engages in contract services and trading activities, management consultancy and marketing activities, and transshipment services. Marco Polo Marine Ltd. was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Singapore.
